name: Masraf Al Rayan Q.P.S.C. - Al Rayan Qatar ETF
summary: The Masraf Al Rayan Qatar ETF is an exchange-traded fund designed to track the performance of the QE Al Rayan Islamic Index, which represents Sharia-compliant companies listed on the Qatar Stock Exchange. The ETF offers investors exposure to the Qatari equity market while adhering to Islamic finance principles. Masraf Al Rayan Q.P.S.C., a Qatari bank, sponsors the ETF.

name: Doha Bank Q.P.S.C - QE Index ETF QETF
summary: Doha Bank Q.P.S.C - QE Index ETF QETF is an exchange-traded fund designed to track the performance of the Qatar Exchange Index, providing investors with exposure to the Qatari stock market. The ETF aims to replicate the index by investing in a diversified portfolio of Qatari companies listed on the exchange. The fund is managed by Doha Bank and provides a convenient way for investors to participate in the growth of the Qatari economy.
